'''Zel''' was the [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Zel system]] and was located in the [[Zeltron Space]] region of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]]: [[Zeloa]], [[Zeldiis]], [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]], [[Zelvahn]] and [[Zellone]].
